title: pelargonium × latidentatum
intro: Pelargonium × latidentatum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × latidentatum include alleviating digestive problems, reducing anxiety and stress, and soothing skin irritations. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
